form.formComment: Jumped well at Richmond two runs back then again settled forward and finished second at this track last start over 520m. Some good form is emerging from that last run. Expected to prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Jumped well at Richmond two runs back then again settled forward and finished second at this track last start over 520m. Some good form is emerging from that last run. Expected to prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th over 520m at this track beaten 5.5 lengths (29.84) behind Slick Splits in a NG on April 4. Boasts a course and distance PB in a lightning 29.36. Top chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 7th over 520m at this track beaten 5.5 lengths (29.84) behind Slick Splits in a NG on April 4. Boasts a course and distance PB in a lightning 29.36. Top chance.

form.formComment: Could manage only sixth last time but caught the eye the start prior when he recorded an outstanding 29.63 over 520m finishing third at this track. Has the ability and expected to go close again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Could manage only sixth last time but caught the eye the start prior when he recorded an outstanding 29.63 over 520m finishing third at this track. Has the ability and expected to go close again.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (30.15) when fifth over 520m at this track in a Grade 5. Has one win and four placings from nine starts from the draw. Will need some luck to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (30.15) when fifth over 520m at this track in a Grade 5. Has one win and four placings from nine starts from the draw. Will need some luck to feature.

form.formComment: Was in the placings last time but prior to that was an easy winner after leading throughout, scoring by 6 lengths in a Grade 5 at Gosford and clocking an excellent 29.42 for the 515m trip. Rates a chance if runs up to recent winning time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was in the placings last time but prior to that was an easy winner after leading throughout, scoring by 6 lengths in a Grade 5 at Gosford and clocking an excellent 29.42 for the 515m trip. Rates a chance if runs up to recent winning time.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 520m. Last start finished 7th over 520m at this track beaten 9 lengths (30.31) behind Nangar Charm in a Grade 5 on April 5. Has ability and worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 520m. Last start finished 7th over 520m at this track beaten 9 lengths (30.31) behind Nangar Charm in a Grade 5 on April 5. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (24.94) when third at Goulburn in a Grade 3/4. Placed at all three starts from this draw. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the frame latest (24.94) when third at Goulburn in a Grade 3/4. Placed at all three starts from this draw. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped on the heels entering the first turn, stumbled and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Had been racing in honest fashion, recording four placings in a row, before finishing fifth (30.00) at Gosford last start. Boxed out wide and looks safely held.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Entering the home straight, tightened for room and checked off heels.
